pet.name: Biscuit
pet.breedColor: scruffy terrier mix with one ear that won't stay down

memories.favoriteActivity: stealing socks and parading them around the kitchen
memories.sleepingSpot: in the crook of the couch by the window
memories.quirks: the head-tilt when you say 'walk'; the sigh before sleep
memories.homecomingMemory: He shook the whole car ride and then fell asleep on Leo's lap before we hit the driveway.
memories.familyMembers: Maria, James, and the cat Pepper
